Title: 🔴 VS Code Live: Code to Canvas with Figma MCP and GitHub Copilot
Author: Visual Studio Code
Description:
The Figma MCP server is now bidirectional. GitHub Copilot users can pull design context into code and push working UI back to the Figma canvas—all from VS Code or the CLI. Tune in to hear from the Figma team about this update and how to get started.

🎙️ Featuring: Harald Kirschner (@digitarald) Akbar Mirza (akbar@figma.com) Amy Lima (alima@figma.com)

#vscode #figma
